articles.title: UFC White House: Alex Pereira to fight Ciryl Gane for interim heavyweight title - BBC
articles.description: Alex Pereira will aim to become the first fighter to win UFC titles in three weight divisions when he faces Ciryl Gane for the interim heavyweight belt at the White House in June.

articles.title: Lucas: Duke Rapid Reactions - University of North Carolina Athletics - University of North Carolina Athletics
South Carolina advances to seventh straight SEC title game - ESPN
articles.description: Ta'Niya Latson and the South Carolina Gamecocks authored an 83-77 victory over the LSU Tigers on Saturday, advancing to their seventh straight SEC championship game final, which extends the longest streak by any program in the conference's history.

articles.title: Chargers, Khalil Mack agree on one-year, $18 million fully guaranteed contract - NFL.com
articles.description: The Los Angeles Chargers and pass rusher Khalil Mack have agreed on a one-year deal, $18 million deal that is fully guaranteed, NFL Network Insider Ian Rapoport reported on Saturday.

articles.description: Ohio State likely clinches its first NCAA Tournament berth in four years as Bruce Thornton breaks the school's all-time scoring record in a 91-78 victory over Indiana.

articles.title: Dan Hurley Loses His Mind, Gets Ejected With One Second Left Against Marquette - OutKick
articles.description: Dan Hurley explodes over a late no-call in UConn’s loss to Marquette, gets ejected by referee Greg Evans, and watches the Golden Eagles secure a 68-62 upset over the No. 4 Huskies.

articles.title: Newcastle 1-3 Manchester City: Marmoush’s second-half show sends City to quarters - NBC Sports
articles.description: Manchester City continued its mastery of Newcastle United and earned a place in the FA Cup quarterfinals with a 3-1 win over the Magpies at St. James' Park on Saturday.

articles.description: Crosby said he has "zero ill will" toward the Raiders.

articles.title: As he contends in PGA Tour debut, John Daly II has come a long way - Golf Channel
articles.description: Daly, the son of legendary pro John Daly, enters Sunday at the Puerto Rico Open three shots back, something he couldn't have done a couple years ago when he was a "bad driver of the golf ball" and battling his swing.
